message:
feat(ntm-ingest): mark gateway agents as terminated when they disappear

When an NTM agent is no longer present in the snapshot (pane closed,
session ended, etc.), we were only removing it from the trackedAgents
map but not updating its gateway lifecycle state.

Add markGatewayAgentTerminated() helper that:
- Retrieves the agent record by gateway ID
- Checks if the agent isn't already in TERMINATED state
- Transitions to TERMINATED with reason "ntm_disappeared"
- Handles errors gracefully with a warning log

This ensures the gateway's agent state accurately reflects reality:
agents that vanish from NTM are properly marked as terminated rather
than being left in a stale running/idle state. This is important for:
- Accurate agent counts in dashboards
- Proper cleanup in dependent services
- Avoiding confusion when debugging agent lifecycle issues

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
